x-enumeration-literals.name: Employee Incentive Program
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Programs designed to motivate and reward employees for achieving specific organizational goals.

Comment:

Performance Bonuses: Cash or monetary rewards for meeting or exceeding performance targets.

Recognition Awards: Non-monetary rewards like plaques, certificates, or public acknowledgment for exceptional work.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Sales Incentive Program
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Programs aimed at motivating sales teams or individuals to achieve revenue targets or sales-related goals.

Comment:

Commissions: Payments based on sales volume or revenue generated.

Contests: Short-term competitions with prizes for top performers.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Loyalty Incentive Program
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Programs designed to encourage repeat purchases and long-term engagement from customers.

Comment:

Points Systems: Customers earn points per purchase that can be redeemed for rewards.

Cashback: A percentage of purchase value returned to the customer as cash or credit.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Channel Partner Incentive Program
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Programs that motivate resellers, distributors, or other business partners to sell more products or perform better.

Comment:

Rebates: Discounts or cash returns based on purchase volumes.

Performance Rewards: Bonuses or prizes for achieving sales or marketing targets.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Government Incentive Program
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Programs established by government agencies to encourage certain behaviors or activities among individuals, businesses, or organizations.

Comment:

Tax Credits: Reductions in tax liability for specific investments or activities.

Grants: Non-repayable funds for projects that meet program objectives.

Subsidies: Financial support to reduce costs for targeted sectors or activities.
